pages.text: $(l)Identity$()$(br2)Apollyon feels darker and heavier than a normal stalker creature. It gives the world a corrupted, doomed feeling.$(br2)$(l)Impression$()$(br2)Its presence feels severe and wrong, not just surprising.

pages.title: Behavior
pages.text: $(l)Mood$()$(br2)It creates dread more than sudden shock.$(br2)$(l)Fear Style$()$(br2)Its strength is the heavy feeling it leaves behind.
